name: mtb_h37rv_IS6110_copy13
description: Insertion sequence IS6110 copy 13 of 16 in this genome. 1355 bp IS3-family element; signature mobile element of the M. tuberculosis complex; copy-number polymorphism is the basis of RFLP fingerprinting (IS6110-RFLP). IS elements are mobile and create paralog signal across distant genomic loci; reads from IS6110 should be reported as multi-mapping.
